text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Here we are at the Hanshin Racecourse today for
the spring Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Which one of these fine competitors will walk
away with the coveted spring shield? Narita
Taishin and Biwa Hayahide, of the BNW trio, are
the two to watch out for today!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
According to the report released yesterday, the
turf should have just the right bounce today.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And these weather conditions are similar to when
I ran the D course last week.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
All you need to do is sit back and watch my
winning equation in action!
